falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 3% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the expected bottom pattern, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 30-day average volume on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would signal a potential blowoff top or extreme market movement, contradicting the current HOLD and suggesting a different outcome.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) crosses above 70 and remains above it for 5 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate overbought conditions and a potential reversal, conflicting with the original bottom pattern's expectations and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
